# lol.trq.alts

> A consumer-agnostic Minecraft account-manager core for Fabric mods: Microsoft, cookie, session, and offline login; an encrypted local account store; async player-head and Hypixel-stats caches; a zero-knowledge shared alt vault; and a clean set of host SPI seams. Pure JDK plus Gson, with no Minecraft or renderer types of its own.

The library is host-agnostic. A consuming mod supplies a handful of backend seams (session injection, storage directory, texture upload, main-thread executor, toasts, an optional stats source, and an optional Microsoft auth config) and wires one `AltsRuntime`. Microsoft login takes the host's own Azure client id; the library ships no default. The shared vault implements the Alt Vault Protocol (AVP), so repositories can be shared across clients.

Notes for implementers: the library never imports a host type, and it must never name a specific consuming mod, client, product, or sponsor in source, docs, or commits. DTOs are Java records with a `@SerializedName` on every component so serialization survives obfuscation. House style is palantir-java-format (4-space, 120 column); run `./gradlew spotlessApply` before committing.

## Documentation

- [README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/lol.trq.alts/main/README.md): Overview, features, and quick start.
- [Architecture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/lol.trq.alts/main/docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Layers, key pieces, and the vault and federation packages.
- [Getting started](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/lol.trq.alts/main/docs/GETTING_STARTED.md): Wiring the seams and using the runtime.
- [Changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/lol.trq.alts/main/CHANGELOG.md): Release history.

## Protocol

- [Alt Vault Protocol (AVP)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/avp-spec/main/SPEC.md): The vendor-neutral wire standard this library's shared vault implements.

## Project

- [Contributing](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/lol.trq.alts/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): How to help.
- [Security policy](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/trqlmao/lol.trq.alts/main/SECURITY.md): How to report a vulnerability.
